description: Kart bwrap mount policy — extend bind_try / env_prefixes for new fleet paths without code changes.

_security_notes.github_ro: ~/github is read-only by default (S4/GAP-A). WILLOW_ROOT + worktrees + WILLOW_GROVE_ROOT nest as read-write on top. Operator-promoted RW: DispatchesFromReality, safe-app-store-public, almanac-template, climate-almanac, health/economy/environment/civic-almanac, willow-bot, quiet-corner, community, jeles-remote. Private safe-app-store stays read-only.
_security_notes.safe_ro: SAFE store + agents + data-vault are read-only via bind_try_read_only (GAP-A: the sovereign data must not be mutable by an arbitrary task).
_security_notes.ssh_dropped: ~/.ssh is no longer bound (S1). SSH git uses SSH_AUTH_SOCK (reachable via /run/user) + ~/.ssh/known_hosts ro, both only on allow_net. Private keys never enter the sandbox.
_security_notes.creds_gated: ~/.config/gh + ~/.netrc and credential_env_prefixes are present only on allow_net (S1/GAP-B). A no-network task gets zero credentials.
_security_notes.localhost_tier: # allow_localhost shares the host network namespace (loopback Ollama works) but still strips credentials and does not bind gh/netrc/ssh. Weaker than --unshare-net isolation; prefer over allow_net for embed-only work.
_security_notes.tmp_tmpfs: /tmp + /dev/shm are private tmpfs, not host binds (S11/S16).
_security_notes.transcripts_ro: S5/KP4 (operator decision 2026-06-12: bind): ~/.claude/projects + ~/.cursor are ro via bind_try_read_only. ~/.claude root stays unbound — it can hold .credentials.json, which must never enter the sandbox.
